channel.title: Crowd Control
channel.description: Latest releases from Crowd Control on Dropout.tv

item.title: Tiny Celebrity
item.description:
Paul, Jamie, and Gianmarco play matchmaker for the audience and try to pass the Bechdel test.

Duration: 42:28

Tags: Crowd Control, jacquis neal, stand up comedy, crowd work, unscripted, competitions, storytelling, cool jobs, alternative lifestyles, red flags, paul f. tompkins, jamie loftus, gianmarco soresi
